{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Iron badge
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Iron]] disciples wear iron badges on their chests.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
